flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Graceland University-Lamoni fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (66.0% → 55.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Graceland University-Lamoni fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (922 → 798).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Graceland University-Lamoni fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (47.4% → 41.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Graceland University-Lamoni vs the 2018–2022 baseline (38.3% vs 46.7%).
